name: city-of-mist-ii
description: City of Mist system for Foundry VTT

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && tsc && copyfiles -u 2 "src/city-of-mist/**/*.css" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.json" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.png" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.webp" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.html" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.hbs" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.mp3" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.wav" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.otf" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.woff2" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.ttf" "src/city-of-mist/**/*.gif" dist/city-of-mist/ && copyfiles README.md dist/ && mv dist/city-of-mist dist/city-of-mist-ii && npm run sync:manifest
scripts.package: npm run build && mkdir -p release && rm -f release/city-of-mist-ii.zip && cd dist && zip -qr ../release/city-of-mist-ii.zip city-of-mist-ii

author: taragnor
